suggestionCards.title: Help me prioritize
suggestionCards.description: Figure out what to study first based on your weak areas and upcoming exams
suggestionCards.prompt: Analyze my current progress, quiz results, and study habits to create a personalized priority list of topics I should focus on for my upcoming NSC exams. Consider which subjects I struggle with most, what topics have the highest weight in the exams, and how much time I have left to prepare.

suggestionCards.title: Start a routine
suggestionCards.description: Create a study schedule that fits your lifestyle and goals
suggestionCards.prompt: Help me create a realistic weekly study schedule that balances all my NSC subjects. Consider my current commitments, preferred study times, and the recommended hours per subject. Include breaks, review sessions, and flexibility for unexpected events.

suggestionCards.title: Explain a topic
suggestionCards.description: Break down any concept you're struggling with
suggestionCards.prompt: I'm having trouble understanding [TOPIC]. Please explain this concept in simple terms with examples relevant to the NSC curriculum. Include common misconceptions to avoid and provide a simple analogy if possible. Then give me a practice problem to test my understanding.

suggestionCards.title: Practice questions
suggestionCards.description: Get exercises to try on specific topics
suggestionCards.prompt: Generate 5 practice questions on [TOPIC] for NSC Grade 12 level. Include a mix of multiple choice and short answer questions. For each question, provide the answer and a detailed explanation. Start with easier questions and gradually increase difficulty.
